alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs, with two promotions; experience setting objectives, measuring performance, and conducting leadership reviews on strategic initiatives
alignments.job_requirement: Drive the OKR-setting process for Streaming Product & Technology leadership; partnering with team leads to set objectives, using informed analysis to define measurable targets, and managing recurring leadership reviews

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product Operations background with requirements logic design, UAT, rollout, and transformation execution; proven ability to work cross-functionally with technical and product teams to measure and drive outcomes
alignments.job_requirement: Be the analytical backbone for key metrics; understand data sets, identify trends, surface insights, and work with Product, Engineering, and Data Science to optimize performance

alignments.candidate_evidence: Transformation program leadership experience with ownership of commercial operations scaling; demonstrated ability to manage multiple workstreams with high attention to detail and executive visibility at Google
alignments.job_requirement: Support leadership review forums and proactively identify opportunities to improve velocity and impact through operational rigor

alignments.candidate_evidence: Global commercial operations scaling at Google demonstrates experience with cross-functional stakeholder management and large-scale program coordination
alignments.job_requirement: Partner on Cultural Transformation; plan town halls, offsites/summits, and represent Streaming Product and Technology at large-scale events

gaps.gap: BI tool proficiency (Tableau, Looker) listed as 'highly preferred' but not confirmed in candidate profile; hands-on SQL and advanced spreadsheet skills not explicitly documented
gaps.mitigation: These are technical tools learnable within 4–8 weeks for a candidate with strategic ops and data-fluency background; not a core blocker for strategy and execution capability

gaps.gap: 10+ years in 'ProdOps, Strategy, or Analytics roles' is stated requirement; candidate background is ~8 years in Google Devices operations and transformation with product component, but framed primarily as strategy and ops rather than native analytics or business intelligence
gaps.mitigation: Candidate meets seniority and cross-functional scope expectations; the exact functional labeling (ProdOps vs. commercial operations + product transformation) is a title/label gap rather than capability gap

gaps.gap: Disney streaming/media industry and OKR/KPI measurement in high-velocity consumer product environment may be new domain; no explicit streaming or entertainment product ops background documented
gaps.mitigation: Strategic ops principles, cross-functional collaboration, and performance measurement are domain-agnostic; ramp-in time expected but not disqualifying

output.summary: Strong functional and seniority alignment: candidate's 8-year Google Devices and Services background with two promotions directly matches Strategy & Operations scope—OKR-setting, performance measurement, cross-functional leadership, and operational transformation. Medium-confidence role fit due to: (1) BI tool skills not confirmed (medium gap); (2) 2-year shortfall on stated 10+ ProdOps requirement, though candidate has equivalent strategic ops seniority; (3) no Disney streaming/entertainment vertical experience, but strategy/ops principles transfer. Principal title at Disney is top-tier IC (~L5–L6) at established company; candidate's L4–L5 eight-year scope is slightly below ceiling but defensible given strategic breadth. Recommend consideration pending BI/SQL depth verification.
uncertainties: Candidate's actual SQL proficiency and BI tool experience (Tableau/Looker) not explicitly stated in profile; critical for analytical backbone role
Extent of OKR/KPI measurement and performance-analytics work at Google Devices ops; was this core vs. supporting function?
Why candidate is positioned as 8 years rather than 10+ in the qualifications: whether gap is intentional (different role family) or simple recency
Candidate's familiarity with streaming/entertainment vertical and high-velocity consumer product culture; degree of onboarding required
